title: WorkUnit
description: A single test work item dispatched by the orchestrator. The Coverage Reviewer writes these; downstream agents consume and append status only. intended_behavior is write-once and serves as the alignment anchor for the Adversarial Reviewer specialists. target_stub_path is populated by the Coverage Reviewer ONLY in tdd-skill mode; it names the source file where the test-author writes a minimal unimplemented! / NotImplementedException stub so the test compiles but fails until the implementation-author writes the green-phase code.

target_file.description: Repo-relative path to the source file under test.

target_symbol.description: Function/method/type being tested. Language-appropriate qualified name (e.g., Rust: Parser::parse_header; C#: Parser.ParseHeader).

kind.description: Dispatch routing. unit -> Sonnet author; integration -> Opus author.

intended_behavior.description: Write-once contract describing what behavior the test must verify. Written by the Coverage Reviewer; immutable thereafter. The Adversarial Reviewer specialists compare test code against this string to detect misalignment.

preconditions.description: Setup state required for the test (e.g., 'database initialized with seed X', 'feature flag Y enabled'). May be empty.

inputs.description: Structured description of the inputs that exercise this behavior.

expected.description: Structured description of the observable outcome (return value, error type, side effect).

fuzzable.description: If true, this target is a candidate for fuzzing. Set by the Coverage Reviewer for functions with parsing, deserialization, untrusted-input boundaries, or arithmetic on adversarial values.

output_file_path.description: Repo-relative path where the test will be written. Pre-assigned by the Coverage Reviewer to prevent parallel-author collisions. Rewritten by the orchestrator to staging if --dry-run is set.

target_stub_path.description: Repo-relative path to the source file where the test-author writes a minimal stub (unimplemented! / NotImplementedException) so the test compiles-but-fails. Populated ONLY by the Coverage Reviewer in tdd-skill mode; null/absent in straitjacket-skill mode (where the source already exists and no stub is needed). May equal output_file_path for in-source unit tests in Rust.

status.description: pending = awaiting author. written = author produced compiling test (+ stub in tdd mode). implemented = implementation-author wrote source to satisfy test (tdd mode only). rejected_lint = compile/lint failed. quarantined = flaky or unrecoverable. surfaced_bug = new test fails 3-for-3 against current code; ESCALATE in summary.

round.description: Iteration index. round 0 is the initial Coverage Reviewer pass. Higher rounds come from adversarial findings. round -1 is reserved for fuzz-discovered reproducer tests appended out-of-band.

source_of_unit.description: Which agent created this work unit. Useful for auditing and for iteration logic.
